_description: Make.com scenario IDs and webhook URLs for Bryan Blair's automation infrastructure.
_status: 9 active scenarios (router patch + 4 signal scanners + 3 context sync + signal feed rewrite). Signal scanners fixed: JSON fence stripping + Layoffs property name corrections. Company Intelligence sync rewritten to query signal DBs directly (was broken by missing Company Core rollup). EOD inbox scan uses browser automation workaround.

router_filter_patch.description: Router filter patch for Notion candidate mapping. Fixed via API blueprint update.

eod_inbox_scan.description: EOD sweep: Claude Code scheduled task reads Outlook Web via browser automation at 5:30 PM ET, formats email data, POSTs to Make.com webhook. Make.com pushes to Notion EOD Scan Output page + Google Drive.
eod_inbox_scan.schedule: webhook (triggered by Claude Code scheduled task 'eod-email-scan' weekdays 17:30)
eod_inbox_scan.note: Power Automate blocked (Wynden Stark LLC env lacks Office 365 Outlook + HTTP connectors). Make.com blocked (no Microsoft 365 OAuth admin). Solution: Claude Code browser automation feeds the webhook.

ai_inbox_classifier.description: Watches Inbox - Quick Capture for Status=New items, classifies via Claude API, routes to correct destination.

weekly_staleness_sweep.description: Sunday 6 AM: archives stale inbox items, sends email summary.

funding_signal_5_50m.description: Daily 6:03 AM ET: Perplexity sonar query for $5-50M biotech funding, creates entries in Notion 5-50M Funding Tracker.

funding_signal_megaround.description: Daily 6:07 AM ET: Perplexity sonar query for $50M+ rounds/IPOs/PIPEs, creates entries in Notion Megaround Funding Tracker.

layoffs_signal.description: Daily 6:11 AM ET: Perplexity sonar query for biotech layoffs/restructuring, creates entries in Notion Layoffs & Restructuring DB.

positive_data_signal.description: Daily 6:15 AM ET: Perplexity sonar query for positive clinical data readouts, FDA approvals, and milestones, creates entries in Notion Positive Data & Milestones DB.

context_sync_active_searches.description: Hourly: Queries Notion Active Searches (Active + On Hold) and writes individual markdown files to OneDrive vault + dashboard summary.

context_sync_candidate_pipeline.description: Hourly: Queries Notion Candidates (Active, Screening, Submitted, Interviewing, Offer) and writes individual markdown files to OneDrive vault + dashboard summary.

context_sync_signal_feed.description: Every 4 hours: Queries all 4 signal databases directly (Positive Data, Layoffs, Funding 5-50M, Megaround) for last 7 days, aggregates into signal-feed.md dashboard. Rewritten 2026-03-29 to remove dependency on Company Core rollup property that never existed.
context_sync_signal_feed.note: Previously 'Context Sync: Company Intelligence to Vault'. Rewritten because Company Core lacks 'Most recent signal date' rollup. Now queries signal DBs directly.

decision_log.description: Watches meeting notes, extracts decisions via Claude API, creates Decision Log entries.
decision_log.spec_location: Notion: Decision Log Automation Setup Guide

voice_dump_intake.description: Webhook receives voice note transcriptions, parses and routes to Notion databases.
voice_dump_intake.blocker: Depends on EOD sweep being stable first
